title: Weekend scheduling
excerpt: Hi Everyone, we are considering switching over to Monday.com and are currently in demo mode. We currently schedule weekday projects and separate weekend projects. I am aware of the option to show/hide weekends, but what …

posts.author: BrandonElrod (Brandon Elrod)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Everyone, we are considering switching over to Monday.com and are currently in demo mode. We currently schedule weekday projects and separate weekend projects. I am aware of the option to show/hide weekends, but what we really need is the ability when scheduling a multi-week project to deselect Saturdays and Sundays, allowing the project to continue on the following Monday. Previous software platforms didn’t offer this option, but would have us schedule a multi-week project one week at a time, which rendered project timeline measurement ineffective. Thank you in advance for any help!
